tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mild hyperchloremia. Urinalysis reveals proteinuria, glucosuria, bilirubinuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), indicating possible renal and/or hepatic dysfunction. Hemoglobin A1c is low, which may reflect anemia or recent hypoglycemia. Recommend further evaluation for renal and hepatic pathology and correlation with clinical findings.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
